===================
=== bd2004-03-08-Chicago [schubert remaster].txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
04-03-08
Park West, Chicago
Schubert remaster of wario recording.

Received in trade on a portable external HD (Thanks ebbbi!). Added ffp's, md5 files from losslessbob site related to this version and new accurate info file for this particular set.

Lineage: ? > wav (exact eac match to LB-1852) > flac (flac 1.1.0 - align on SB option - level ? - verify on)

Enjoy!

Luisbp51 (Hungercity July 31, 2011)

Tracklist:

Disk One

01. Announcement
02. Tangled Up In Blue
03. Don't Think Twice
04. It's All Right
05. High Water (For Charley Patton)
06. Silvio
07. Positively 4th Street
08. Watching The River Flow
09. Lay, Lady, Lay
10. Cold Irons Bound
11. Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 

Disk Two

01. Bye And Bye
02. Dignity
03. Honest With Me
04. Shooting Star
05. Summer Days
06. Man In The Long Black Coat
07. Cat's In The Well
08. Like A Rolling Stone
09. All Along The Watchtower

further info: http://www.bjorner.com/DSN25720%20-%202004%20US%20Spring%20Tour.htm#DSN25790
